# PhysiologicPRISM

## What it is
PhysiologicPRISM is an AI-powered clinical reasoning and documentation platform for physiotherapists. It guides clinicians through a structured 11-module assessment workflow — from subjective examination to treatment planning — and uses AI to generate defensible, evidence-based clinical documentation.

## Who it is for
- Solo physiotherapists who want consistent, structured documentation
- Physiotherapy clinics standardizing assessments across a team
- University physiotherapy programs teaching clinical reasoning to students
- Research teams capturing structured physiotherapy assessment data

## Core problem it solves
Physiotherapists know how to reason clinically but struggle to document it consistently — especially under time pressure. PhysiologicPRISM structures the entire reasoning process so nothing is missed, and AI generates the documentation automatically.

## Key features
- 11-module PRISM clinical reasoning framework (subjective, pathophysiological mechanisms, chronic disease factors, clinical flags, objective assessment, functioning assessment, patient perspectives, initial plan, provisional diagnosis, SMART goals, treatment plan)
- Quick Mode: AI pre-fills all fields at once using only 8 AI calls per full assessment (2-3x more efficient than field-by-field mode)
- Normal Mode: AI suggests content field-by-field on demand
- Biopsychosocial factor capture built into every assessment
- PDF report generation
- HIPAA-conscious architecture on Microsoft Azure
- GDPR-aligned data workflows
- Voice input (Azure Speech Services)
- 14-day free trial, no credit card required

## Pricing (INR)
- Free Trial: 14 days, full access, no credit card
- Solo Professional: ₹4,499/month (~$50 USD) — 1 user, unlimited patients, 250 AI calls/month
- Team (5 users): ₹16,299/month — 5 users, unlimited patients, 1,250 AI calls/month
- Team Pro (10 users): ₹32,799/month — 10 users, unlimited patients, 2,500 AI calls/month
- Institute (15 users): ₹49,199/month — 15 users, unlimited patients, 3,750 AI calls/month
- Institute (20 users): ₹65,599/month — 20 users, unlimited patients, 5,000 AI calls/month

## Technology
- Web application (browser-based, mobile-responsive, PWA)
- Works on Windows, macOS, Linux, iOS, Android
- Backend: Python/Flask on Azure Container Apps
- Database: Azure Cosmos DB
- AI: Azure OpenAI (GPT-4o)
- Voice: Azure Speech Services

## Built by
Dr Roopa Rao — a practicing physiotherapist. PhysiologicPRISM is built by a clinician for clinicians, grounded in the evidence-based biopsychosocial PRISM clinical reasoning framework.
